activation_key.description: Specifies the key used to activate the gateway; must be provided if activation is required.

average_download_rate_limit_in_bits_per_.description: Defines the maximum average download rate in bits per second; useful for bandwidth throttling.

average_upload_rate_limit_in_bits_per_se.description: Defines the maximum average upload rate in bits per second; useful for bandwidth throttling.

cloudwatch_log_group_arn.description: Specifies the ARN of the CloudWatch log group for monitoring and logging gateway activity.

gateway_ip_address.description: Defines the IP address of the gateway; must be reachable within the network.

gateway_name.description: Specifies the name of the gateway; must be unique within the region and follow naming conventions.

gateway_timezone.description: Sets the timezone for the gateway; required for scheduling maintenance and other time-based operations.

gateway_type.description: Defines the type of gateway being deployed (e.g., file, volume, tape); optional depending on configuration.

gateway_vpc_endpoint.description: Specifies the VPC endpoint to connect the gateway to; required for private network configurations.

maintenance_start_time.description: Defines the start time for gateway maintenance in UTC, including optional day specifications.

medium_changer_type.description: Specifies the type of medium changer for tape gateways; required for tape-based workflows.

smb_active_directory_settings.description: Configures SMB settings for Active Directory integration, including domain details and credentials.
smb_active_directory_settings.type: list(object({active_directory_status: optional(string),domain_controllers: optional(list(string)),domain_name: string,organizational_unit: optional(string),password: string,timeout_in_seconds: optional(number),username: string}))

smb_file_share_visibility.description: Controls whether SMB file shares are visible to clients on the network; true enables visibility.

smb_guest_password.description: Sets the password for guest access to SMB file shares; required if guest access is enabled.

smb_security_strategy.description: Defines the security strategy for SMB file shares (e.g., client authentication methods).

tags.description: Provides key-value pairs for tagging the gateway resource; used for organization and cost tracking.

tape_drive_type.description: Defines the type of tape drive to use in tape gateways; required for tape-based storage configurations.

timeouts.description: Specifies timeout settings for resource creation operations, including optional custom durations.
